allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File "c:\\Users\\shekp\\OneDrive\\Рабочий стол\\python learn" | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in @\('.html','.json','.js','.css','.svg'\) } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "c:\\Users\\shekp\\OneDrive\\Рабочий стол\\python learn" | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("c:\\Users\\shekp\\OneDrive\\Рабочий стол\\python learn\\", ""\) } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\shekp\\OneDrive\\Рабочий стол\\python learn"; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m", "http.server", "8080" -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/" -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Error: $_" })
